query:
SELECT 
  JSON_EXTRACT(analysis, '$.modules[*].id') as module_ids,
  COUNT(*) as total_diagnostics,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN paymentStatus = 'paid' THEN 1 END) as paid_count,
  ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN paymentStatus = 'paid' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) as conversion_rate
FROM diagnostics 
WHERE analysis IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY JSON_EXTRACT(analysis, '$.modules[*].id')
ORDER BY conversion_rate ASC
LIMIT 20;
